pases.hora: 13:30 - Konvent - CONCERT GRATUÏT / DINAR Compra ONLINE

sinopsis_cat: Contemplem les ovelles, les rapinyaires i els rierols. Comptem les pedres. Les triem per mides i per colors. També intentem trobar el camí per passar a l’altra banda de la muntanya. A vegades hi arribem, a vegades no. Inutile Randonnée és un viatge iniciàtic poblat de sintetitzadors decidits, de sorolls estranys i de guitarres musculoses. Un duo  format per Antoine Bocquet i Anthony Caruna (Cirque Pardi!) basat al sud de França.
sinopsis_eng:
We contemplate the sheep, the birds of prey, and the streams. We count the stones. We sort them by size and by color. We also try to find the path to cross to the other side of the mountain. Sometimes we make it, sometimes we don’t.
Inutile Randonnée is an initiatory journey filled with determined synthesizers, strange noises, and muscular guitars. A duo formed by Antoine Bocquet and Anthony Caruna (Cirque Pardi!), based in the south of France.
